# Software Planning

Create an implementation plan.

## Steps

1. Understand the feature or change request.
2. Define requirements.
3. Design architecture.
4. Break into tasks.

## Output format

Overview  
Architecture design  
Task breakdown  
Implementation steps  
Testing strategy
